name: Hominy Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Active Dry Yeast, or 1 package
Instant yeast is fine - Prepare 2 envelopes
recipeInstructions:
This bread pairs well with stews or makes a tasty side dish for fried chicken.
Note: The original recipe called for 1 tablespoon butter. Add all ingredients to the machine in the order listed. Select either regular or light crust based on preference and press Start. Ensure that the cooked grits are not too watery, as this can cause the top of the bread to collapse. I found the flavor to be quite enjoyable.
